title: SimplyCubed Skills Catalog
description: The public consumer contract for catalog.json — the data the storefront (simplycubed.com/skills) renders. GENERATED by scripts/generate.mjs from config/skills/*.yaml; never hand-edited. Bump schemaVersion on any breaking shape change.

schemaVersion.description: Contract version. A consumer should refuse a schemaVersion it does not understand. v3: `version` is string|null — the upstream-declared version at the pinned SHA, or null for an unversioned skill (sort those by certification.scannedAt).

marketplace.description: Marketplace identifier; matches the Claude Code plugin marketplace name.

version.description: The upstream-declared SemVer version at the pinned SHA, or null when the skill is unversioned (upstream declares none). Never a fabricated default. When null, sort/display this skill by certification.scannedAt. The pattern applies only to the string case.

path.description: Subdirectory of the skill, when applicable.

sourceUrl.description: Canonical upstream/source page for the skill.

tier.description: free = openly installable; premium = subscription-gated (delivered via the entitlement service, not this repo). Premium skills are omitted from the public plugin manifest.

removalUrl.description: Deep link to a pre-filled GitHub issue form for the skill's author/rights-holder to request removal (collects ownership proof). Render as a 'Request removal' link on the skill page.

install.description: How to install this skill. Every skill is a plain SKILL.md folder, so it installs into any compatible agent; Claude Code also offers a one-command path.

marketplaceAdd.description: Run once to add the marketplace.

folder.description: Vendor-neutral install: place the folder into an agent's skills directory.

dirName.description: Folder name to create in the target directory.

source.description: Browsable source of the exact published folder, pinned to the certified SHA.

targets.description: Where to drop the folder, per agent.

status.description: certified = passed the scan; revoked = a prior pass now fails; pending = not yet scanned; incomplete = a required scanner was skipped, never certifiable.

scannedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the scan, or null when pending.

record.description: The full scan record (structure/license/injection + gitleaks + osv), or null when pending. Shape is the <slug>.scan.json produced by scripts/scan.mjs; consumers should read `tools`, `checks`, and `review` to render the 'what we checked' detail.
